name: couplechat-server
description: Sustainable backend for CoupleChat native clients.

scripts.check: npm run test && npm run build
scripts.test:unit: node --import tsx --test tests/ai-memory/ai-memory.test.ts tests/ai-queue/agent-conversation-state.test.ts tests/ai-queue/ai-queue.test.ts tests/auth/auth.test.ts tests/events/domain-events.test.ts tests/lifecycle/shutdown.test.ts tests/message/message.test.ts tests/observability/operation-log.test.ts tests/operations/backup-safety.test.ts tests/push/bark.test.ts tests/socket/presence.test.ts tests/upload/upload.test.ts tests/utils/cursor.test.ts
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run smoke:postgres
